idea_summary.topic: low-cost water purification invention by a student

reports.recommended_format: Vertical short, 30 to 45 seconds, subtitle overlay in Arabic and English
reports.hook: Open on the filter actually working on dirty water in the first 2 seconds, no intro.
reports.caption: مهندسة شابة صنعت فلتر مياه من مواد محلية بسيطة... شاهدوا كيف بيشتغل
dos: Lead with the working demo, not narration
donts: Do not bury the demo after 5 seconds of setup
Avoid formal MSA-only captions for this platform
reports.why: TikTok in Egypt over-indexes on quick visual proof and colloquial Arabic for this age group.

evidence.claim: Short-form video remains the dominant format for the 18 to 24 age group in Egypt

reports.recommended_format: Reels 9:16 under 60 seconds with Arabic caption overlay
reports.hook: Start mid-action: the filter producing clean water with a surprised reaction.
reports.caption: ابتكار مصري يحول المياه القذرة لمياه نقية بأدوات بسيطة #نجوم_العلوم
dos: Use Reels for maximum non-follower reach
Add a poll or question sticker to the linked Story
donts: Do not post a static image for a physical demo
Avoid captions longer than 125 characters on Reels
reports.why: Instagram Reels reach extends well beyond followers in Egypt and suits bilingual young audiences.

evidence.claim: Short-form video remains the dominant format for the 18 to 24 age group in Egypt

reports.recommended_format: Vertical short, 30 to 60 seconds, bilingual subtitles
reports.hook: Show the before and after water comparison in the first 3 seconds.
reports.caption: طالبة خليجية طورت فلتر مياه منزلي بأدوات بسيطة... هل تصدق هذا؟
dos: Use trending Gulf Arabic audio clips to boost discoverability
Tag the Stars of Science official account
donts: Avoid Egyptian dialect — Gulf Arabic resonates more with the Saudi audience
Do not use voiceover without subtitles
reports.why: TikTok Saudi Arabia has a large youth population actively engaging with science and innovation content.

evidence.claim: Saudi Arabia has among the highest TikTok usage rates in the MENA region for the 16-24 demographic

reports.recommended_format: Reels 9:16, 45 to 90 seconds, Arabic and English subtitles
reports.hook: Open with a wide shot of local materials, then cut immediately to the working filter.
reports.caption: ابتكار بسيط يحل مشكلة كبيرة. طالبة عربية تصنع فلتر مياه من الصفر #نجوم_العلوم
dos: Post a carousel with step-by-step stills to complement the Reel
Engage comments within the first 30 minutes
donts: Do not use formal MSA captions — Gulf colloquial performs better
reports.why: Instagram in Saudi Arabia has one of the highest penetration rates in the Arab world, especially for the 18-34 segment.

evidence.claim: Saudi Arabia has one of the highest Instagram penetration rates in the Arab world among 18-34 year olds
